visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with short hair, wearing glasses, a blue patterned flat cap, and a grey 'Roots' t-shirt, stands against a plain off-white wall. He holds a clear transparent smartphone case in his left hand, gesturing with his right while speaking enthusiastically with wide eyes. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a clear smartphone case with a dark grey circular MagSafe ring on the back. The case is held against a grey textured background, slowly rotating to show its clarity. (3) A white iPhone is shown inside the imos transparent case. The camera focuses on the MagSafe ring and the metallic lens protector rings around the three camera lenses. (4) Two transparent cases are placed side-by-side on a light wooden display stand: one is a new 'imos' case (clearer) and the other is an 'old version' (distinctly yellowed). Text overlays appear comparing them. (5) Close-up shots focus on the flexible TPU edges of the case. Fingers are seen squeezing and pressing the edges to demonstrate the 'QQ' elastic texture. The lighting is bright and even. (6) A macro shot highlights a dedicated silver-colored camera control button integrated into the side of the clear case. A finger is seen sliding and clicking the button, with an on-screen camera interface visible in the background. (7) The phone is placed face-down on a wooden table. A finger presses the top corner to show that the case's raised edges prevent the screen and camera from touching the surface, maintaining stability. (8) Detailed view of the bottom of the case, showing the precision cut-out for the USB-C port and the reinforced raised edges surrounding it. (9) A white MagSafe charging puck is snapped onto the back of the phone case. The animation shows it aligning perfectly with the circular ring. (10) The man returns to the screen, standing behind a wooden table with several colored cases (black, green, blue, purple, transparent) displayed on stands. He points toward the camera with a thumbs-up gesture. (11) A slow-motion drop test sequence shows a phone in the case falling onto a flat surface, bouncing slightly without damage, accompanied by UL certification text graphics.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你們猜猜看. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥 @3ctim. (2) [Variety]: 兩個月?!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 不想要讓你的透明保護殼變成黃黃髒髒舊舊的話. (4) [Slogan]: imos軍規防摔殼 iPhone 17 系列. (5) [Slogan]: iPhone 16 拍照相機按鍵系列. (6) [Subtitle]: 使用三個月後 imos保護殼 舊版保護殼. [Variety]: 高規格的抗汙 抗黃化處理. (7) [Variety]: 原本的透亮感. (8) [Subtitle]: 側邊全面採用了TPU材質. (9) [Variety]: QQ的. (10) [Slogan]: 獨家相機按鍵. (11) [Variety]: 操作起來非常順手. (12) [Variety]: 緩衝凸點 加高設計 不會變成蹺蹺板. (13) [Subtitle]: 3mm的背板 完美呈現. (14) [Logo]: 內建 ⚡. (15) [Slogan]: UL Solutions 軍規防摔驗證 MIL-STD-810H 測試. (16) [Variety]: 防摔效果. (17) [Variety]: 透明 黑色 綠色 藍色 紫色 一共五色. (18) [Slogan]: BUY NOW.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator acting as the host.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a blue patterned cap, a grey t-shirt with a 'Roots' logo, and a wooden beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist studio setup with a light grey or off-white plain wall, a wooden table surface for product close-ups, and a wooden display rack for phone cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator speaking in Mandarin. The background music is a bright, uptempo electronic pop track with a steady kick drum and synth bass. The recording is studio-clean with very high vocal clarity. (2) A bright 'Ding' SFX (sparkle sound) triggers as the visual switches to a close-up of the product. The BGM remains consistent. (3) A subtle 'Pop' sound effect occurs during a graphic transition. The narrator's pitch rises during the comparison of the two cases to emphasize the difference. (4) A sharp mechanical 'click' sound is heard, perfectly synced with the finger pressing the camera button on the phone case, simulating the tactile feedback of the device. (5) A resonant 'Thud' or impact sound occurs as the phone hits the table during the drop test demonstration. The BGM ducks slightly to allow the impact noise to be prominent. (6) The video concludes with the narrator providing a call to action. A final 'Ding' SFX accompanies the appearance of the 'Buy Now' graphic while the music fades out with a hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem (Yellowing) -> Solution (imos Case) -> Detailed Features -> Proof (Drop Test) -> CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the imos military-grade protective case for iPhone by highlighting its anti-yellowing properties, tactile button design, and certified drop protection through a series of close-up demonstrations and comparative tests.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly names the brand imos, demonstrates its unique features, shows the packaging/logos, and provides a 'Buy Now' call to action.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density editing style typical of social media marketing, combining fast cuts, on-screen text, and synced SFX to maintain viewer engagement during a technical product pitch.
